narrative:
Precinct Bantam Ridge (precinct in Jefferson County) has 1,103 registered voters, with 58.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 21.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.7%, a narrow Republican lean of 1.7 percentage points.
